headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading higher after the U.S. and Israel launched strikes against Iran over the weekend. Iran's decision to close the Strait of Hormuz contributes to investor concern that conflict could spread across the region as tensions escalate and disrupt supplies
summary: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading higher after the U.S. and Israel launched strikes against Iran over the weekend. Iran's decision to close the Strait of Hormuz contributes to investor concern that conflict could spread across the region as tensions escalate and disrupt supplies

headline: Phillips 66 to speak at Morgan Stanley Energy & Power Conference
summary: HOUSTON, March 02, 2026--Mark Lashier, chairman and CEO of Phillips 66, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Energy & Power Conference.

headline: How a U.S.-Iran war could 'immediately' impact gas prices at the pump, according to experts
summary: Higher oil prices will cause an almost immediate jump in gasoline prices, as well, experts say.
